/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/main_tui_art.dir/main_tui_art.c.o CMakeFiles/main_tui_art.dir/main_functions.c.o -o main_tui_art   -L/opt/homebrew/opt/notcurses/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/notcurses/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/curl/lib/libcurl.dylib _deps/cjson-build/libcjson.a -lnotcurses-core -lnotcurses -lnotcurses-ffi -lm
